message:
feat(error): Comprehensive error type system with context

Replace basic Message variant with rich error variants:
- Parse { line, message }: Parse errors with line numbers
- Validation { line, message }: Strict mode violations
- EventStream { message }: Event processing errors
- PathExpansion { path, message }: Path resolution errors
- Io { operation, path, source }: I/O with context
- Json { message }: JSON serialization errors
- Message: Preserved for backward compatibility

Add constructor methods for common error patterns:
- parse(), unterminated_string(), missing_colon_after_key()
- io_read(), io_write(), io_open(), io_create()
- validation(), json_serialize(), json_deserialize()
- path_expansion(), circular_reference(), missing_include()

Update lib.rs exports for new error system.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
